headline: Western Digital (WDC) Valuation Check After Strong 1-Year Return And Recent Share Price Cooldown
summary: Western Digital (WDC) is back on investor radars after another active stretch in the stock, with recent returns over the past month and past 3 months prompting closer attention to its data storage business profile. See our latest analysis for Western Digital. At a share price of $455.8, Western Digital has cooled off slightly in the past week, with the 7 day share price return down 6.74%, yet its 30 day and year to date share price returns of 22.36% and 142.83% hint that momentum has been...

headline: Himax, Western Digital, and Amkor Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after a broad-based sell-off hit the semiconductor sector following news of a potential strike at Samsung and a stake sale by Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC), which rattled global chip supply chains.

headline: WD Customer Survey Highlights Growing Focus on Scale, Economics, and Reliability in AI Infrastructure Planning
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., May 20, 2026--As AI has evolved into continuous, production-scale data systems, the challenge of managing the explosive growth of data storage requirements is now at the same level as compute challenges. In a new survey of a cross-section of its largest global customers and distributors, Western Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: WDC) found that, amongst other unique market insights, enterprises are prioritizing infrastructure that delivers proven reliability, predictable economics,

headline: Love Stories Unwind
summary: The average S&P 500 stock gained 35% in the year leading up to the index's most recent all-time closing high made last Thursday (5/14).
